new_classes.definition_en: Water that complies with Directive 2009/54/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council on the exploitation and marketing of natural mineral waters, classified under CN subheading 2201 10 (Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The primary distinguishing criterion — that the water must comply with Directive 2009/54/EC — is captured via the new NaturalMineralWater class (a subclass of MineralWater) and the hasValue restriction on compliesWithDirective. The CN heading code 220110 is anchored. However, the legal note applies jointly to 22011011 and 22011019 (which are distinguished by whether the water is carbonated or not — a criterion not made explicit in this shared note). That container/carbonation-based split between the two sibling codes cannot be fully inferred from this note alone, hence the score is reduced slightly to 0.8. The note does not address container volume or other numeric thresholds for this specific code.
